ksa_text: Knowledge of ML model serving architecture and deployment strategies, including REST API serving, batch inference, streaming inference, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, shadow deployments, and the latency, throughput, cost, and failure mode trade-offs of each.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-004 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4082 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.408, dcwf=0.394, nice=0.391) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4082 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-004 (composite 0.4082) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4082 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Performance Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4082 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4082, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
